text:
SHORT NAME: IP_LOW_VOL_PYMT_AMT 

LONG NAME: IP_LOW_VOL_PYMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the IP Low Volume Amount that is present on any of the claim 
records included in the stay (i.e., the sum of the low volume amounts reported on the claims that 
comprise the stay). 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
